message:
feat(runtime): expand test coverage for backend registry, buffer views, and device placement; bump oracle fixture count to 846

- Add 11 new tests to fj-runtime/backend.rs covering BackendError display
  variants (transfer, execution), equality, BackendCapabilities fields with
  and without memory limits, and BackendRegistry empty-state behavior
  (default_backend, get, available_backends, resolve_placement, fallback)
- Add 9 new tests to fj-runtime/buffer.rs covering empty buffer, zeroed
  empty, mutable write, clone independence, equality across devices,
  BufferView empty/full/boundary/nested slice scenarios
- Add tests to fj-runtime/device.rs covering explicit DevicePlacement,
  DeviceId ordering, and Platform display
- Add tests to fj-runtime/lib.rs for runtime mode defaults and evidence
  ledger operations
- Bump README oracle fixture table from 21→33 linalg/FFT cases and total
  from 834→846 reflecting recently added oracle fixtures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -672,10 +672,10 @@ uv pip install --python .venv/bin/python jax jaxlib numpy
 |---------------|-------|--------|
 | Transform (jit/grad/vmap/lax/control_flow/mixed_dtype) | 611 | JAX 0.9.2 |
 | RNG determinism (key/split/fold_in/uniform/normal) | 25 | JAX 0.9.2 |
-| Linear algebra + FFT oracle | 21 | JAX 0.9.2 (x64) |
+| Linear algebra + FFT oracle | 33 | JAX 0.9.2 (x64) |
 | Transform composition (jit+grad, grad+grad, vmap+grad, jacobian, hessian) | 15 | JAX 0.9.2 (x64) |
 | Dtype promotion (9x9 dtype matrix, add + mul) | 162 | JAX 0.9.2 (x64) |
-| **Total** | **834** | |
+| **Total** | **846** | |
 
 ## Building from Source
